## Tags
tube, vial, phial, flask, ampoule, ampule, lab, chemistry, experiment, test

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/test-tube-diagonal)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TestTubeDiagonal;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TestTubeDiagonal { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
